LanguageData.VTE_ACCompressor.description: An air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate two additional AC devices without losing efficiency.
LanguageData.VTE_ACCompressor.label: AC compressor
LanguageData.VTE_ACControlUnit.description: A main air conditioning control unit. Connects to compressors to allow AC units to generate cool or hot air. Needs to be connected to compressors by air ducts. AC control unit dictates the desired temperature for all AC units in the same network. Installing too many AC units may decrease the efficiency of the network, increasing the power drain of all devices. Constructing additional compressors will improve the efficiency of the network.
LanguageData.VTE_ACControlUnit.label: AC control unit
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnit.description: An air-conditioning machine that fits into a wall. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts.
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnit.label: AC unit
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnitWall.description: A wall-mounted air-conditioning machine. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_ACUnitWall.label: wall-mounted AC unit
LanguageData.VTE_AirDuct.description: An air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors.
LanguageData.VTE_AirDuct.label: air duct
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large, industrial-type air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. It’s capable of cooling the room to much lower temperature than the standard cooler.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialCooler.label: industrial cooler
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large, industrial-type heater machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. It is capable of heating up the room to a much higher temperature than the standard heaters.
LanguageData.VTE_IndustrialHeater.label: industrial heater
LanguageData.VTE_LargeACCompressor.description: A large air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate six additional AC devices without losing efficiency.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeACCompressor.label: large AC compressor
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.description: A large, ceiling-mounted fan. Can be used to quickly cool down rooms during the summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food, it will aim to reach a room temperature of 17C.
LanguageData.VTE_LargeCeilingFan.label: large ceiling fan
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.description: A ceiling-mounted fan. Can be used to slowly cool down rooms during the summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food, it will aim to reach a room temperature of 17C.
LanguageData.VTE_SmallCeilingFan.label: small ceiling fan
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.description: A free standing air-cooling machine. Cool air comes out of a fan and spreads over surrounding area. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food.
LanguageData.VTE_StandingCooler.label: standing cooler
LanguageData.VTE_UndergroundAirDuct.description: A subterranean air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors.
LanguageData.VTE_UndergroundAirDuct.label: subterranean air duct
LanguageData.VTE_VentValve.label: air duct valve
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.description: A heating machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can be used to heat up rooms during winter.
LanguageData.VTE_WallHeater.label: wall heater
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: A wall-mounted air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedCooler.label: wall-mounted cooler
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A wall-mounted device that converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedHeater.label: wall-mounted heater
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple, wall-mounted vent for equalizing the temperature between two rooms without allowing people to walk between them. Can only be constructed on a wall.
LanguageData.VTE_WallMountedVent.label: wall-mounted vent
